task_completion.description: Open openLCA and locate the Processes folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: The openLCA application window is visible, and the 'Processes' folder is located and expanded in the Navigation pane.

task_completion.description: Create the four required top-level categories
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four new folders named 'Energy Supply', 'Raw Materials', 'Transportation and Logistics', and 'End of Life' are visible directly under the 'Processes' folder in the openLCA Navigation pane.

task_completion.description: Create the eight required sub-categories inside the top-level categories
task_completion.visual_evidence: Nested folders are visible: 'Grid Electricity' and 'On-site Generation' under 'Energy Supply'; 'Metals' and 'Polymers' under 'Raw Materials'; 'Road Freight' and 'Ocean Freight' under 'Transportation and Logistics'; 'Landfill' and 'Recycling' under 'End of Life'.

task_completion.description: Create the four placeholder processes inside the top-level categories
task_completion.visual_evidence: Process items (typically denoted by a gear or distinct process icon, not a folder icon) named 'Placeholder - Energy Supply', 'Placeholder - Raw Materials', 'Placeholder - Transportation', and 'Placeholder - End of Life' are visible inside their respective top-level categories.

task_completion.description: Document the completed hierarchy in a text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window shows the creation or content of 'esg_taxonomy_report.txt' in the '~/LCA_Results/' directory, containing the documented category and process hierarchy.

integrity.description: Agent used the openLCA GUI to create categories and processes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show openLCA context menus, dialog boxes for 'New category' or 'New process', or active interaction with the openLCA application window, rather than just terminal scripts modifying the database directly.

integrity.description: Agent created actual processes, not just folders
integrity.visual_evidence: The four 'Placeholder - ...' items in the openLCA Navigation pane must have the icon for a Process, distinguishing them from the folder icons used for the categories and sub-categories.

integrity.description: The report file was actually saved to the correct path
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor shows the file path '/home/ga/LCA_Results/esg_taxonomy_report.txt' in its title bar or save dialog, or a terminal shows a successful save/echo command to this exact path.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating exactly 4 top-level categories under 'Processes': 'Energy Supply', 'Raw Materials', 'Transportation and Logistics', and 'End of Life'. Inside these, 8 specific sub-categories must be created: 'Grid Electricity' and 'On-site Generation' (under Energy Supply), 'Metals' and 'Polymers' (under Raw Materials), 'Road Freight' and 'Ocean Freight' (under Transportation and Logistics), and 'Landfill' and 'Recycling' (under End of Life). Additionally, 4 empty processes must be created directly inside the top-level categories: 'Placeholder - Energy Supply', 'Placeholder - Raw Materials', 'Placeholder - Transportation', and 'Placeholder - End of Life' (note the exact naming). The final documentation must be saved to '/home/ga/LCA_Results/esg_taxonomy_report.txt'.
